config: owned attention default-on + Q4K_GEMV_WARP, ctx1024, W==D fixed start_pos, .item() in window, median-40, warm-8, interleaved repeats
interpretation: Shrinking the cache max_context 4608->1536 (3x) gives +11.8% tok/s, ->1280 gives +12.9%. The cost is MAXC-proportional (the full-MAXC cache materialization, NOT the valid-prefix attention read which is ctx-proportional and unchanged). Owned tile + Q4K kernels unchanged. So the materialization is REAL and ON the W==D critical path -- a runtime-KV that touches only the valid prefix (or appends in place) would recover ~this much. At MAXC=1280 tinygrad reaches ~97 tok/s = ~llama parity.
